name: Von Bertalanffy (surface-area-limited) unperturbed tumor growth
description: Unperturbed tumor growth law dV/dt = a*V^(2/3) - b*V. Proliferation scales with the tumor SURFACE (V^(2/3): nutrient and oxygen access at the rim) while loss scales with VOLUME (V), the classic von Bertalanffy / ontogenetic growth model. Growth is sub-exponential from the start (the specific growth rate falls monotonically with size) and approaches a carrying capacity V_inf = (a/b)^3, where dV/dt = 0. Completes the spec §2 growth-law family (exponential / logistic / Gompertz / Simeoni / von Bertalanffy-power-law). Illustrative values; review_status unverified.

extraction.tier_rationale: Established structural form; illustrative value (set with b so V_inf=(a/b)^3=200).
